title: Draw-Gloves
content:
At draw-gloves we'll play,
And prithee let's lay
A wager, and let it be this:
Who first to the sum
Of twenty shall come,
Shall have for his winning a kiss.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Draw-Gloves"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
